wiki.summary: “Lips” is the lead single to be released from Jane Remover’s second studio album, “Census Designated”. The track was initially previewed on June 1, 2022 during a live performance. “Lips” was mixed by Kayla Reagan, and mastered by Héctor Vega, including additional guitar and bass played by Douglas Dulgarian. Promotional photos for the album and single were taken by Brendon Burton. Read more on Last.fm.
